category_sources: source_facts.description describes tenv as an OpenTofu, Terraform, Terragrunt, Terramate, and Atmos version manager.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official tenv documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/tofuutils/tenv; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists supported tools and calls tenv a version manager; source_facts.executables lists tenv and related tool shims.
